enriched_points.expanded_content: The stem cell niche provides essential signals that promote self-renewal, ensuring a balance between stem cell proliferation and differentiation, vital for tissue maintenance.
Niche components, including signaling molecules, guide stem cells in their differentiation pathways, influencing their fate towards specific cell types necessary for tissue function.
Stem cell niches dynamically adjust to physiological demands, facilitating rapid responses to injury or stress, thus maintaining homeostasis and promoting tissue regeneration.
